hooks.command: file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$file" ]; then if echo "$file" | grep -qE 'migrations/0[0-9][2-9]|migrations/[1-9][0-9]'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not create new migration files. Modify 001_initial_schema.sql directly (pre-release).' >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$file" | grep -qE 'encryption\.key|\.env\.uat'; then echo "BLOCKED: $file contains secrets. Edit manually." >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE 'encryption\.key|\.env\.uat'; then echo "BLOCKED: $file contains secrets. Edit manually." >&2; exit 2; fi

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -e '.run_in_background == true' >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'BLOCKED: Never use run_in_background for agents. They stall on permission prompts. Use superpowers:dispatching-parallel-agents instead.' >&2; exit 2; fi

file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$file" ] && [ -f "$file" ]; then case "$file" in *.go) gofmt -w "$file" 2>/dev/null && echo "gofmt: $file" ;; *.templ) PATH="$HOME/go/bin:/usr/local/go/bin:$PATH" templ fmt "$file" 2>/dev/null && echo "templ fmt: $file" ;; esac; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'gh pr merge'; then echo 'PR merged. Run /post-merge-cleanup to update main, clean worktrees, and delete plan files.'; fi
